<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Luxturna is indicated for the treatment of adult and paediatric patients with vision loss due to inherited retinal dystrophy caused by confirmed biallelic RPE65 mutations and who have sufficient...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>mitral valve prolapse, myxomatous（56.4%）</li>
<li>pituitary dwarfism（56.3%）</li>
<li>cystic hygroma（55.8%）</li>
<li>conductive hearing loss disorder（55.8%）</li>
<li>susceptibility to mononeuropathy of the median nerve, mild（54.3%）</li>
<li>Wiskott-Aldrich syndrome 2（54.0%）</li>
<li>non-syndromic esophageal malformation（54.0%）</li>
<li>hypermobility syndrome（54.0%）</li>
<li>woolly hair, autosomal recessive 3（53.8%）</li>
<li>obsolete hypertension, diastolic, resistance to（53.8%）</li>
<li>obsolete rare tumor of gallbladder and extrahepatic biliary tract（53.7%）</li>
<li>isolated sedoheptulokinase deficiency（53.5%）</li>
<li>ocular tuberculosis（53.5%）</li>
<li>cornea plana 1, autosomal dominant（53.4%）</li>
<li>musk, inability to smell（53.4%）</li>
<li>polyhydramnios, chronic idiopathic（53.4%）</li>
<li>childhood encephalopathy due to thiamine pyrophosphokinase deficiency（53.2%）</li>
<li>hemifacial microsomia（52.7%）</li>
<li>congenital insensitivity to pain-hypohidrosis syndrome（52.6%）</li>
<li>corneal degeneration, band-shaped spheroid（52.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
